description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with five evenly spaced open shelves, constructed from a solid, uniform material. The front face reveals the open compartments, each shelf providing ample space for storage or display. The sides and back are flat and unadorned, giving the object a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The shelves are supported by thick vertical panels, suggesting durability and stability. The color is a consistent light gray, and there are no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements. This type of shelving unit is commonly found in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces for organizing books, tools, or supplies.
description: A tall, light gray open shelving unit with five spacious shelves and a minimalist, utilitarian design. The structure is solid and freestanding, suitable for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open shelves and the full height of the unit.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat side panel and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, featureless back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a solid, flat panel.
